reasoning.research_depth: Thorough economic analysis tracing Puerto Rico from Operation Bootstrap through Section 936 to debt crisis, with specific data (tax savings per employee, bond refinancing stats)
reasoning.signal_noise: Excellent signal - each section builds logically on the previous, minimal tangents, sponsor integration brief and non-intrusive
reasoning.originality: Fresh angle on Puerto Rico's decline through the lens of Section 936 tax policy, connecting macro policy to local outcomes
reasoning.lasting_impact: Strong educational value about unintended consequences of tax policy, relevant framework for understanding territorial economics

transcript_assessment: Representative deep-dive economic analysis typical of PolyMatter
